meaning: n.FORTRAN语言,公式翻译程序语言
examples: Appendix 1 shows the Fortran DFT source program.
Fortran, in particular, has found a happy home under Linux.
For those without someone to swoon over, perhaps a bit of technology nostalgia and a Fortran manual will do.
What used to be the rarefied province of the Fortran-initiated is now, of course, available to anyone with a smartphone.
